title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Protocol 16: CTAB-Hot Acid Phenol Method for Algae

final reaction buffer was filter purified using Nalgene 0.22 μM filter.","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{},"guid":"40BB6924313A4E8E8B639121DCF94952"}}}}
steps: Preheat phenol and phenol:chloroform to 65 °C . Heated phenol should not be re-used.
Collect algae cells via centrifugation for 00:10:00 at at Room temperature .
Re-suspend the frozen pellet in 800 µL of preheated extraction buffer .
Incubate at 65 °C for 01:00:00 . Gently vortex every 00:15:00 .
Cool to Room temperature .
Collect the aqueous phase by centrifuging for 00:10:00 in micro-centrifuge at at Room temperature .
Collect aqueous phase and re-extract with an equal volume of chloroform.
Collect aqueous phase and add 10 Molarity (M) LiCl to a final concentration of 3 Molarity (M) .
Recover the RNA by centrifugation at at 4 °C for 00:20:00 .
Dissolve pellet in DEPC treated water.
Extract the aqueous phase with equal volume of phenol:chloroform (5:1).
Vortex for 00:01:00 at Room temperature .
Extract the aqueous phase with equal volume of chloroform.
Collect aqueous phase and add 1/30 volume of 3 Molarity (M) sodium acetate pH 5.5 and 0.1 volume of 100 % ethanol.
To the clear supernatant add 3 Molarity (M) sodium acetate pH 5.2 to a final concentration of 0.3 Molarity (M) and 3 volumes of 100 % ethanol.
Spin in micro-centrifuge at 4 °C at top speed for 00:20:00 .
Wash the pellet with 70 % ethanol.
Invert tubes and air dry at room temperature.
Resuspend pellets in 50 µL of DEPC treated water.
Flash freeze pellets with liquid nitrogen and keep at -80 °C until extractions are carried out.
Add equal volume of chloroform.
Shake vigorously until 2 phases form an emulsion.
Centrifuge as above.
Allow the RNA to precipitate at 4 °C overnight.
Spin for 00:05:00 in a micro-centrifuge at top speed.
Mix well and keep on ice for 00:30:00 .
Centrifuge in cold for 00:25:00 .
A white jelly-like pellet consisting mostly of polysaccharides is obtained and discarded.
Allow the RNA to precipitate at -80 °C for 03:00:00 to overnight.
Extract once with hot acid phenol.
creator: Eric Carpenter
